REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (2126 Ortega Street, San Francisco, Ca 94122)
Off Calendar Sep-11-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Avid Alavi for Scott Hodges.

The sale was confirmed at $700,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed August 15, 2014. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $181,000.00 is required.

Petition For Order To Bring Trust Under Continuing Court Supervision, To Appoint Successor Trustee; To Fix Bond And To Transfer Merrill Lynch Account
Off Calendar Oct-28-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lawrence Siracusa for and with Scott Hodges (Conservator/Proposed Trustee). Erica Wilner Rosenblatt for Rose Degges (Conservatee).

The Court granted the Petition To Bring The Trust Under Court Supervision and the Petition To Appoint Successor Trustee Scott Hodges as the Parties stated that there were no objections. Mr. Siracusa stated that the bulk of the assets were in the conservatorship, that he would be presenting a Petition For Summary Judgment and that he was working with Counsel to amend the trust to incorporate all of the beneficiaries and bring a petition to fund the trust. The Court stated that it would not order the Merril Lynch account to be transferred to the trust. Mr. Siracusa stated that no one had control over the Merrill Lynch account and requested the account be put into the Conservatorship. In addition, Mr. Siracusa requested striking the current bond as the only asset was the house. The Court took the issue regarding transfer of the Merrill Lynch account to the conservatorship and the issue regarding striking of the bond under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy S. Mann.
